rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 2/10 and reach the same conclusion for the same reasons: strong senior IC in distributed systems but no people management, no team-scaling track record, and only nascent agentic AI experience for an executive CTO role. The wording differs (the variant adds mention of the open-source GISCollective project and 'regulated domain' framing), but these are run-to-run rewording differences, not shifts tied to the Berlin→San Francisco location change. No score change, new concern, or reasoning keys off the location.
